description: Create a two-column content slide comparing 2006 vs 2016 PCT life sciences patent publications by origin of applicant using two donut charts and labeled percentage callouts.

header.kicker: 2. Life Sciences – Addressing major challenges of humanity
header.headline: Similarly, in terms of patent publications by origin of applicant – Asian countries are catching up, the US and Europe are loosing
header.sub: Selected PCT Life Sciences1) publications by origin of applicant [% of global total]

footer.source: Source: Wipo. 1) PCT (Patent Cooperation Treaty: Intellectual property rights enforced in 148 countries worldwide) applications here refer to analysis of biological materials, medical technology, biotechnology, pharmaceuticals, food chemistry, environmental technology
